header.name: Nathan Cheng
subtitle: Designer who codes, with a background in film studies and graphic design.
Bridges design, development, and business needs to make complex systems legible.

sections.label: Skills
bullets: **Design & UX:** Interface design, Design systems, Information architecture, Prototyping, Visual design
**Development:** JavaScript/React, HTML/CSS, Tailwind, Next.js, Git, Responsive design, AI workflows, MCPs
**Tools & Platforms:** Cursor, Figma, Sanity CMS, Notion, Obsidian; Prompt engineering, Production LLMs

entries.title: Full-stack portfolio website
bullets: **Designed flexible content architecture separating project data from presentation:** Built schemas supporting mixed media with metadata-driven filtering, enabling layout changes without content migration

**Implemented iOS-quality interactions:** Custom lightbox with origin-aware transitions, scroll-driven animations for card stacking effects, URL-based filter sharing; prioritized perceived performance with motion timing + progressive loading
**Shipped to production replacing legacy Cargo site:** Handled full deployment including Vercel hosting, Sanity Studio configuration, DNS setup, and cache revalidation webhooks

entries.title: Personal digital infrastructure and tools
bullets: **Designed information architecture for personal knowledge system:** Created metadata schema and linking structure across 1000+ notes supporting exploratory browsing, maintainability, and long-term retrieval (nathancheng.fyi)

entries.title: Design and Systems Manager
entries.summary: Solo designer / systems manager at family-run B2B software company (users at 3M, EPA, Lilly, PepsiCo).
bullets: **Designed workflow builder interface unifying 40+ configuration options:** Studied Windows UI patterns, created component system with progressive disclosure for serial device communication
**Reduced recurring setup questions ~30%** by producing walkthrough video series replacing 90s-era documentation—scripted, recorded, and edited with motion graphics
**Planned e-commerce platform architecture:** Data models, offline licensing flows, and Stripe integration to replace legacy store with modern stack supporting B2B/reseller workflows
**Leveraged direct customer support experience** to identify UX pain points, shaping design and documentation priorities

entries.title: Designer and Developer
bullets: **Built React/Next.js config generator for LLM interview chatbot,** reducing setup errors for screening question flows
**Wrote Python script workaround to preserve image fidelity** when late-notice Techstars delivery requirements revealed Google Slides compression would degrade designs
**Led pitch deck strategy (3 startups):** Competitor analysis, market positioning, visual direction for investor presentations

entries.title: Fellowship at Venture for America (now Ember Fellowship)
bullets: **Selected for competitive entrepreneurship fellowship (10% acceptance);** trained in product strategy and design thinking with IDEO and Frog Design workshops
**Led 5-person team to win Judge Pick and Crowd Favorite in 3-day product sprint:** Defined MVP scope, designed UI prototypes, pitched city exploration app to VC/executive panel

entries.title: Web development foundations (The Odin Project) + Animations on the Web (Emil Kowalski)
Wesleyan University - B.A. in Film Studies, Minor in Integrated Design and Engineering
bullets: **3.71 GPA;** Honors, Dean's List; Frank Capra Prize for technical excellence in filmmaking and humor

**Led team to first place in videogame dev intensive led by Bethesda founder:** Managed 4-person team from concept to iOS demo, planned level structure and art direction, enhanced visuals in Unity game engine, pitched to industry jury (Harmonix, Warner Bros. Games, Demiurge)
